home.title: VirtuTry - AI Virtual Try-On | See How Clothes Look on You
home.description: Upload your photo and try on any outfit virtually. AI shows you exactly how clothes fit before you buy — no more guesswork, no more returns.

pricing.title: Pricing - VirtuTry
pricing.description: Simple, transparent pricing for virtual try-on. Choose a plan that fits your shopping habits or buy credits on demand.

blog.title: Blog - VirtuTry
blog.description: Fashion tips, styling guides, and updates from the VirtuTry team. Learn how AI is transforming the way we shop for clothes.

contact.title: Contact Us - VirtuTry
contact.description: Get in touch with the VirtuTry team. We'd love to hear your feedback and will respond as quickly as possible.

login.title: Login - VirtuTry
login.description: Sign in to your VirtuTry account to access AI virtual try-on and see how clothes look on you.

signup.title: Sign Up - VirtuTry
signup.description: Create your VirtuTry account and start trying on clothes virtually. Get free credits on sign-up.

terms.title: Terms of Service - VirtuTry
terms.description: Read our terms of service to understand the rules and guidelines for using VirtuTry.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy - VirtuTry
privacy.description: Learn how VirtuTry collects, uses, and protects your personal information and photos.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy - VirtuTry
cookies.description: Understand how VirtuTry uses cookies and similar tracking technologies on our platform.

refund.title: Refund Policy - VirtuTry
refund.description: Review our refund policy to understand the conditions and process for requesting refunds.
